description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling

diff: Given the rationale behind the Target Document [A.1.

- A5 - Alignment Conservers - Powers And Constraints - ACs Can Be Operationally Active In Only One Role At A Time](9b1d1c2f-ace0-4637-8050-4711ae9f9a8c), the 'simultaneous occupying of two ecosystem roles' prohibition should likely not be limited to just the AC stakeholder category, but rather should apply universally to any Sky stakeholder who occupies a role formally defined in the Atlas. What would be the arguments for and against such a position?
Given the rationale behind the Target Document [A.1.5
- A5 - Alignment Conservers - Powers And Constraints

- ACs Can Be Operationally Active In Only One Role At A Time](9b1d1c2f-ace0-4637-8050-4711ae9f9a8c), the 'simultaneous occupying of two ecosystem roles' prohibition should likely not be limited to just the AC stakeholder category, but rather should apply universally to any Sky stakeholder who occupies a role formally defined in the Atlas. What would be the arguments for and against such a position?
